title: Oil: Brent $111.26 (+3%), WTI $99.93 (+3%); Trump dissatisfied with Iran proposal
snippet: Brent crude futures advanced nearly 3% to settle at $111.26. WTI jumped more than 3% to close at $99.93 (near $100 intraday). Surge driven by report that Trump is dissatisfied with Iran's proposal to open Hormuz, stalled peace efforts, and UAE OPEC exit adding market uncertainty. Brent +55% since war began Feb 28.
tag_reason: 유가 지속 추적. Brent $108→$111 (+3%), WTI 거의 $100 도달은 새 수치.
